---
title: "plot_instructions.qmd"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Data used located in data/cleaned/orange_cases.csv

ggplot:

```{r}
ggplot(
     orange_cases, 
     aes(x = date, y = cumulative_cases)) + 
     geom_line() + 
     labs(
           x = "Date",
           y = "Cumulative Cases",
           title = "Total COVID19 Cases Evolution in Orange County"
       )
```
